Class ClashFreeSubst.VariableCollectVisitor

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.logic.ClashFreeSubst.VariableCollectVisitor
All Implemented Interfaces:
DefaultVisitor, Visitor<Term>
Enclosing class:
ClashFreeSubst
public static class ClashFreeSubst.VariableCollectVisitor extends Object implements DefaultVisitor
A Visitor class to collect all (not just the free) variables occurring in a term.
